hooks.message: Force push blocked by Velocity guardrail. Use --force-with-lease instead to protect against overwriting others' work.
Hard reset blocked. Stash your changes (git stash) or commit them first. Hard reset cannot be undone.
Committing directly to main/master detected. Use a feature branch and open a PR instead.
Destructive rm -rf command detected outside of build artifact directories. Confirm this is intentional before proceeding.
DROP TABLE/DATABASE/SCHEMA blocked by Velocity guardrail. Use a reversible migration with an explicit down step. Never drop schema in an agent session.
DELETE FROM without WHERE clause detected. This will delete ALL rows. Add a WHERE clause or confirm this is intentional.
TRUNCATE TABLE detected. This deletes all rows without WHERE filtering. Confirm this is intentional.
Pipe-to-shell command blocked. Never execute untrusted remote scripts. Download and inspect the script first.
Package publish detected. Confirm version, changelog, and release notes before publishing to the registry.
